summary_en: ¥7,600/share tender offer by Gerbera holdings for 1,825,640 MetalArt shares (min. 867,000 / 30.29% S/O). Period May 15 – Jun 25, 2026 (30 business days). Offeror to acquire complete control (完全子会社化). Target board recommends acceptance. Settlement Jul 2, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Commencement of Tender Offer for Common Shares of MetalArt Corporation (Code: 5644) by Gerbera holdings Corporation
translation_en_brief: Gerbera holdings Corporation has initiated a tender offer to acquire all ordinary shares of MetalArt Corporation (TSE Standard Market, Code 5644). The tender price is ¥7,600 per share. The offeror plans to acquire 1,825,640 shares during the offer period from May 15 to June 25, 2026 (30 business days), with a minimum acceptance threshold of 867,000 shares (representing 30.29% of shares outstanding as of March 31, 2026). The stated purpose is to make MetalArt a wholly owned subsidiary of Gerbera holdings. MetalArt's board of directors resolved on May 14, 2026 to endorse the tender offer and to recommend that shareholders tender their shares. Settlement is scheduled for July 2, 2026. Nomura Securities serves as the tender agent.
